title: Multipartite Entanglement
description: Explore entanglement in systems with more than two parties. Learn about GHZ and W states, entanglement classification, genuine multipartite entanglement, and graph states used in quantum computing.
learningObjectives: Distinguish between different classes of multipartite entanglement
Construct and analyze GHZ, W, and cluster states
Define and detect genuine multipartite entanglement
Understand SLOCC classification of entangled states
Implement graph state construction and stabilizer formalism
Apply multipartite entanglement to quantum protocols
